versioning_policy.major: breaking schema, queue, assignment, SLA, approval, dependency, permission or API change
versioning_policy.minor: new backward-compatible queue type, task type, SLA rule, dashboard metric, report or workflow extension
versioning_policy.patch: bug fix, validation update, copy/config correction
versioning_policy.task_versioning: Task events are append-only; state changes produce event history rather than overwriting audit context.

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
